basic_details.job_title: Zilla Parishad Akola Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Parishad Akola Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 09-05-2026 on the official website. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the Zilla Parishad Akola Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Medical Council Registration, Internship Certificate, MSCIT
qualification.details: MBBS Medical Council Registration Internship Certificate MSCIT

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Zilla Parishad Akola Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Zilla Parishad Akola recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Zilla Parishad Akola Ad-hoc Medical Officer Group-A (M.Va.A.Se.) posts is 15-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer Group-A (M.Va.A.Se.) position in Zilla Parishad Akola.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree, valid Medical Council Registration, an Internship Certificate, and MSCIT qualification to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer Group-A (M.Va.A.Se.) post is 58 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer Group-A (M.Va.A.Se.) role.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Ad-hoc Medical Officer Group-A (M.Va.A.Se.) position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Zilla Parishad Akola. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.
